title: Guanciale and Syrian Flatbread Pizza
description: A simple but flavorful flatbread topped with crispy guanciale and spicy Syrian pepperoni.
instructions: Cut the Syrian flatbread into 4-6 pieces.
Place the flatbread pieces on a baking sheet.
Drizzle the olive oil over the flatbread.
Sprinkle the red pepper flakes over the flatbread.
Bake the flatbread in the oven for 10-12 minutes, or until crispy.
While the flatbread is baking, cook the guanciale slices in a pan over medium heat until crispy.
Remove the flatbread from the oven and top with the crispy guanciale slices.
